stemHtml: In the data link process, the purpose of the logon is to provide the ATS unit with…

options.a: Information on the relevant Controller-Pilot Data Link Communications (CPDLC) systems and the version used in the applications, as well as flight plan data requested by the data link.
options.b: Information on the systems supported by the aircraft, the unique identification of the aircraft, and additional information to correlate with the flight plan.
options.c: The navigation aid equipment installed on the aircraft.
options.d: Only the unique identification of the aircraft.
